title: Weekly Team Standup

actionItems.task: Set up staging environment for new template

content:
## Agenda
1. Sprint progress check
2. Q2 roadmap discussion
3. New template demo

## Discussion

### Sprint Progress
On track for all committed stories. Bob finished the staging setup ahead of schedule. Charlie needs another day on the docs.

### Q2 Roadmap
Alice presented the draft roadmap. Key themes:
- Developer experience improvements
- Performance optimization
- Community template marketplace

Team agreed on priorities. Final review next Tuesday.

### Template Demo
Showed the new knowledge base template. Team liked the single-entity approach. Feedback:
- Add markdown preview in the UI
- Consider adding a graph view later

## Decisions
- Sprint cadence stays at 2 weeks
- Q2 roadmap final review on Tuesday
- Knowledge base template moves to beta next week
summary: Sprint on track, Q2 roadmap reviewed, knowledge base template demo went well.
